title: AI Operations Specialist

must_haves.req: Hands-on, proven experience deploying AI tools (Claude, Cursor, n8n, Zapier)
must_haves.note: Claude Code agent builder; matches the named tools and 'deploying not experimenting' bar reasonably.

must_haves.req: 2-5 years in product ops / BizOps / strategy / technical programme management
must_haves.note: ~6.4 yrs operator experience but framed as GTM/community/founder's-associate, not titled product-ops/BizOps.

must_haves.req: Build multi-step agentic workflows connecting AI models to internal systems
must_haves.note: Builds agents for intel/growth; less evidence connecting to enterprise internal systems at scale.
No SQL/BI evidence on CV (Amazon Alexa data-analyst role is adjacent but not stated as SQL/BI).
Automation/agent interest present; formal API/integration work not evidenced.
Explicitly NOT required; 'apply even without all skills' stated, so domain is not a blocker.

one_line_verdict: Open, no degree or fintech-domain gate, and AI-tool fluency fits well; main soft gaps are SQL/BI and a formal product-ops title — plausible with strong AI-builder framing.
fetch_note: Full JD from job-boards.greenhouse.io/capitalontap/jobs/8520481002 (open). Capital on Tap is a profitable SME credit/card fintech (1,000+ staff); role is AI-automation execution within Operations, not a regulated-finance practitioner role, so fintech domain is not a blocker. Apply via Greenhouse or careers@capitalontap.com.
